TestCase.name: testAggregate
TestCase.Resource: LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[$0], EXPR$1=[$1], EXPR$2=[$2]) +- LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[AVG($0)], EXPR$1=[SUM($1)], EXPR$2=[COUNT($2)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])

HashAggregate(isMerge=[true], select=[Final_AVG(sum$0, count$1) AS EXPR$0, Final_SUM(sum$2) AS EXPR$1, Final_COUNT(count$3) AS EXPR$2]) +- Exchange(distribution=[single]) +- LocalHashAggregate(select=[Partial_AVG(a) AS (sum$0, count$1), Partial_SUM(b) AS sum$2, Partial_COUNT(c) AS count$3]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c])

TestCase.name: testAggregateWithFilter
TestCase.Resource: LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[$0], EXPR$1=[$1], EXPR$2=[$2]) +- LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[AVG($0)], EXPR$1=[SUM($1)], EXPR$2=[COUNT($2)]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[=($0, 1)]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], c=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])

HashAggregate(isMerge=[true], select=[Final_AVG(sum$0, count$1) AS EXPR$0, Final_SUM(sum$2) AS EXPR$1, Final_COUNT(count$3) AS EXPR$2]) +- Exchange(distribution=[single]) +- LocalHashAggregate(select=[Partial_AVG(a) AS (sum$0, count$1), Partial_SUM(b) AS sum$2, Partial_COUNT(c) AS count$3]) +- Calc(select=[CAST(1 AS INTEGER) AS a, b, c], where=[(a = 1)]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c])

TestCase.name: testAggregateWithFilterOnNestedFields
TestCase.Resource: LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[$0], EXPR$1=[$1], EXPR$2=[$2], EXPR$3=[$3]) +- LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[AVG($0)], EXPR$1=[SUM($1)], EXPR$2=[COUNT($2)], EXPR$3=[SUM($3)]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], c=[$2], $f3=[$2._1]) +- LogicalFilter(condition=[=($0, 1)]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], c=[$2]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])

HashAggregate(isMerge=[true], select=[Final_AVG(sum$0, count$1) AS EXPR$0, Final_SUM(sum$2) AS EXPR$1, Final_COUNT(count$3) AS EXPR$2, Final_SUM(sum$4) AS EXPR$3]) +- Exchange(distribution=[single]) +- LocalHashAggregate(select=[Partial_AVG(a) AS (sum$0, count$1), Partial_SUM(b) AS sum$2, Partial_COUNT(c) AS count$3, Partial_SUM($f3) AS sum$4]) +- Calc(select=[CAST(1 AS INTEGER) AS a, b, c, c._1 AS $f3], where=[(a = 1)]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c])

TestCase.name: testGroupAggregateWithFilter
TestCase.Resource: LogicalFilter(condition=[=($0, 1)]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], EXPR$0=[$1], EXPR$1=[$2], EXPR$2=[$3]) +- LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}], EXPR$0=[AVG($0)], EXPR$1=[SUM($1)], EXPR$2=[COUNT($2)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])

Calc(select=[CAST(1 AS INTEGER) AS a, EXPR$0, EXPR$1, EXPR$2]) +- HashAggregate(isMerge=[true], groupBy=[a], select=[a, Final_AVG(sum$0, count$1) AS EXPR$0, Final_SUM(sum$2) AS EXPR$1, Final_COUNT(count$3) AS EXPR$2]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[a]]) +- LocalHashAggregate(groupBy=[a], select=[a, Partial_AVG(a) AS (sum$0, count$1), Partial_SUM(b) AS sum$2, Partial_COUNT(c) AS count$3]) +- Calc(select=[a, b, c], where=[(a = 1)]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b, c])

TestCase.name: testGroupAggregateWithHaving
TestCase.Resource: LogicalFilter(condition=[>($1, 3)]) +- LogicalProject(b=[$0], s=[$1]) +- LogicalAggregate(group=[{1}], EXPR$0=[SUM($0)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])

Calc(select=[b, EXPR$0], where=[>(EXPR$0, 3)]) +- HashAggregate(isMerge=[true], groupBy=[b], select=[b, Final_SUM(sum$0) AS EXPR$0]) +- Exchange(distribution=[hash[b]]) +- LocalHashAggregate(groupBy=[b], select=[b, Partial_SUM(a) AS sum$0]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b])

TestCase.name: testOrderByExprWithFetchThenGlobalAggregate
TestCase.Resource: LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[$0]) +- LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[MAX($0)]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0]) +- LogicalSort(sort0=[$2], dir0=[ASC], fetch=[10]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0], b=[$1], $f2=[+($0, 1)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])

HashAggregate(isMerge=[false], select=[MAX(a) AS EXPR$0]) +- Calc(select=[a]) +- SortLimit(orderBy=[$f2 ASC], offset=[0], fetch=[10], global=[true]) +- Exchange(distribution=[single]) +- SortLimit(orderBy=[$f2 ASC], offset=[0], fetch=[10], global=[false]) +- Calc(select=[a, b, +(a, 1) AS $f2]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b])

TestCase.name: testOrderByThenGlobalAggregate
TestCase.Resource: LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[$0]) +- LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[MAX($0)]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])

HashAggregate(isMerge=[true], select=[Final_MAX(max$0) AS EXPR$0]) +- Exchange(distribution=[single]) +- LocalHashAggregate(select=[Partial_MAX(a) AS max$0]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b])

TestCase.name: testOrderByWithFetchThenGlobalAggregate
TestCase.Resource: LogicalProject(EXPR$0=[$0]) +- LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[MAX($0)]) +- LogicalProject(a=[$0]) +- LogicalSort(sort0=[$1], dir0=[ASC], fetch=[10]) +- LogicalTableScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]])

HashAggregate(isMerge=[false], select=[MAX(a) AS EXPR$0]) +- Calc(select=[a]) +- SortLimit(orderBy=[b ASC], offset=[0], fetch=[10], global=[true]) +- Exchange(distribution=[single]) +- SortLimit(orderBy=[b ASC], offset=[0], fetch=[10], global=[false]) +- TableSourceScan(table=[[default_catalog, default_database, MyTable]], fields=[a, b])
